issues.sample: ENGINE CUT OFF WHILE RIDING ON HIGHWAY SPEED. IT STARTED AFTER 10 MINUTES OF TRYING.    THE ENGINE WILL TURN, BUT IT WILL NOT START, THE FUEL PUMP WILL NOT PRIME.  AFTER MULTIPLE TIMES OF TURNING THE KILL SWITCH ON/OFF IT FINALLY STARTED.    IT HAPPENED AGAIN MULTIPLE TIMES BUT N

narrative.headline: What 2012 Honda Cbr600rr owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
